title: Top 10 Must-Watch Movies of the Decade
description: The article is a table listing the top 10 movies of 2009, including Avatar, The Hurt Locker, Inglourious Basterds, Up, District 9, Star Trek, Up in the Air, The Blind Side, Invictus, and Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince.

title: Top Headlines of 2009: Obama, iPhone, Pandemic, and More
description: The article is a table listing major events that occurred in 2009, including Barack Obama's inauguration, the passing of an economic stimulus package, the H1N1 pandemic, Michael Jackson's death, and the announcement of a troop surge in Afghanistan.

title: Oscar Winners 2009: Slumdog, Sean Penn, and Heath Ledger Shine
description: The article lists the winners of the major categories at the 2009 Academy Awards, including Best Picture for Slumdog Millionaire, Best Director for Danny Boyle, and Best Actor for Sean Penn.

title: Top news for year 2009
description: Top news for year 2009 Top news for year 2009 Home Date Headline January 20, 2009 Barack Obama is inaugurated as the 44th President of the United States...
